description: Workday Worker/Employee data to Salesforce Contact or User sync. Production-validated.
criticalRules: Workday REST API responses are wrapped in data array: payload.data map (worker) -> ...
Workday Worker_ID is the external ID for Salesforce upsert - always set Worker_ID__c
Workday dates come as ISO 8601 with timezone: '2024-01-15T00:00:00.000Z' - strip time for date fields
Workday phone numbers include country code and extension in separate fields - concatenate carefully
Workday org hierarchy comes as nested array - extract primary position only: worker.positions[0]
Salesforce upsert via /composite/sobjects requires externalIdFieldName in URL
Workday boolean fields come as true/false strings, not booleans in some versions
Terminated workers have Employment_Status = 'Terminated' - set IsActive = false in Salesforce

keyMappings.Title: worker.positions[0].position_title default null
keyMappings.ManagerId: Lookup by worker.managers[0].Worker_ID - must be pre-resolved
keyMappings.AccountId: Salesforce Account lookup via company name or external ID

workdayApiStructure.raasReport: Workday RaaS reports return differently - payload.Report_Entry array

dateConversion: fun stripTime(d) = if (d != null and d != '') (d[0 to 9]) else null
commonFailures: positions array is empty for terminated workers - always use positions[0]? before accessing fields
email_addresses can be empty array - use [0]? not [0]
Workday tenant URL changes between environments - use properties placeholder
Manager circular reference: manager not yet synced to Salesforce - use two-pass sync
Phone format varies by country - Salesforce phone validation may reject some formats
